spec_match.rationale: Exceptional walkthrough simulation of the endpoint migration flow, detailing database updates and endpoint state transitions.

interactive.rationale: Brilliant wizard interface that lets users advance through stages, updating live endpoint status chips and log outputs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly explains how Chrome 138 prevents silent push notification loss.

edge_cases.rationale: Contains no active browser capability detection probe on page load.

references.rationale: Includes valid reference links to the ChromeStatus entry and the official Push API spec.

design_system.rationale: Integrates with system colors and fonts beautifully.

openQuestions.title: Add browser capability checks for PushManager
openQuestions.detail: Add a lightweight browser check on load to verify if PushManager and ServiceWorkers are supported natively in the visitor's browser.

summary: An exceptionally well-crafted interactive wizard walkthrough of the endpoint migration lifecycle that includes correct specification and ChromeStatus reference links. It is only lacking an active browser support badge.
